section_title: Power to fill vacancy in the office of liquidator.-- If a vacancy occurs by death, resignation or otherwise, in the
content:
302. Power to fill vacancy in the office of liquidator.-- If a vacancy occurs by death, resignation or otherwise, in the
office of a liquidator then the vacancy maybe filled in by the Court when the liquidator was appointed by the Court or by the
creditors where the liquidator was appointed by creditors.
